mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM module WHERE status = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(table_rows), 0) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()
SELECT CONCAT(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(data_length + index_length), 0) / 1024 / 1024, 2), ' MB') FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()
SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) FROM module WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

SELECT m.table_name as tableName, m.module_name as moduleName, COALESCE(t.table_rows, 0) as count, CASE WHEN (SELECT MAX(table_rows) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()) > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(t.table_rows, 0) * 100.0 / (SELECT MAX(table_rows) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE())) ELSE 0 END as percentage FROM module m LEFT JOIN information_schema.tables t ON m.table_name = t.table_name AND t.table_schema = DATABASE() WHERE m.status = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(t.table_rows, 0) DESC LIMIT 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO module (module_name, table_name, description, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{moduleName}, #{tableName}, #{description}, 1, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO sys_field_config (table_name, prop, label, ui_type, options, is_show_in_list, sort_order, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{tableName}, #{prop}, #{label}, #{uiType}, #{options}, #{isShowInList}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_field_config SET label = #{label}, ui_type = #{uiType}, options = #{options}, is_show_in_list = #{isShowInList}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, update_time = NOW() WHERE table_name = #{tableName} AND prop = #{prop}
